cards.title: Update dashboard board layout
cards.plan: Make the work board responsive and keep cards readable across desktop, tablet, and phone viewports.
cards.nextAction: Run browser checks on the updated board.
cards.lastOutput: Implemented responsive column behavior and compact evidence rendering.

cards.title: Validate dashboard refresh behavior
cards.plan: Verify desktop and mobile layouts and capture reproducible evidence for release review.
cards.nextAction: Run mobile viewport smoke after the dashboard is served locally.
cards.lastOutput: Desktop smoke passed; mobile evidence remains open.

blocker.nextAction: Serve the dashboard and rerun mobile smoke.

cards.title: Review dashboard release readiness
cards.plan: Confirm implementation evidence, QA results, and any remaining release risks.
cards.nextAction: Review QA evidence after mobile smoke completes.
cards.lastOutput: Release gate is waiting on mobile evidence.

cards.title: Document dashboard acceptance criteria
cards.plan: Define readable states for board columns, activity feed, evidence rows, and empty states.
cards.nextAction: Support review questions if implementation finds a mismatch.
cards.lastOutput: Acceptance criteria delivered to the team.
